productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men  Black Formal Shoe
description: Up the ante of your formal fashion with this leather shoe from lee cooper. Designed in a low profile silhouette with durable material to offer unparalleled comfort, this loafer makes for a perfect addition to the wardrobe of the confident executive. Upper Smooth leather upper with a leather inner lining for a sophisticated look and all-day comfort Concealed elastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offer a customised Fit Ergonomically curved leather lined footbed Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole textured on the forefoot, front midfoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe away dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a branded leather conditioner when needed Do not store in direct sunlight
